list.name: activity_id
list.label: Activity
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, name || ' (' || TO_CHAR(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ')' AS __text FROM activities ORDER BY date DESC

list.name: map_metric
list.label: Map color
list.query: Speed : speed_kmh, Heart Rate : hr, Power : power

panels.title: Route

targets.rawSql: SELECT lat AS "latitude", lng AS "longitude", CASE '${map_metric}' WHEN 'speed_kmh' THEN speed_kmh WHEN 'hr' THEN hr WHEN 'power' THEN power END AS "metric", time_offset FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND lat IS NOT NULL AND lng IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time_offset;

panels.description:
GPS route with color overlay.

Use the Map Color dropdown to switch between:

• Speed — green (fast) to red (slow)

• Heart Rate — green (low) to red (high)

• Power — green (low) to red (high)

panels.title: HR Zones

targets.rawSql: WITH lthr AS (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT value::numeric FROM sync_state WHERE key = 'configured_max_hr' AND value::numeric > 0), (SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY max_hr) FROM activities WHERE max_hr IS NOT NULL AND max_hr > 0)) AS thr), data AS (SELECT CASE WHEN s.hr < lthr.thr * 0.68 THEN 'z1' WHEN s.hr < lthr.thr * 0.83 THEN 'z2' WHEN s.hr < lthr.thr * 0.94 THEN 'z3' WHEN s.hr < lthr.thr * 1.05 THEN 'z4' ELSE 'z5' END AS z FROM activity_streams s, lthr WHERE s.activity_id = ${activity_id} AND s.hr IS NOT NULL AND s.hr > 0) SELECT 'HR' AS "x", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z1'), 0) AS "Z1 Recovery", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z2'), 0) AS "Z2 Endurance", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z3'), 0) AS "Z3 Tempo", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z4'), 0) AS "Z4 Threshold", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z5'), 0) AS "Z5 VO2max";

panels.description:
Time in each heart rate zone.

Zones based on LTHR (lactate threshold HR),

estimated as 95th percentile of your max HRs

or configured via VELOAI_MAX_HR.

🔘 Z1 < 68% — Recovery

🔵 Z2 68-83% — Endurance

🟢 Z3 83-94% — Tempo

🟡 Z4 94-105% — Threshold

🔴 Z5 > 105% — VO2max

panels.title: Power Zones
panels.description:
Time in each power zone.

Zones based on FTP, estimated from best

20-min power × 0.95 or configured via VELOAI_FTP.

🔘 Z1 < 55% — Recovery

🔵 Z2 55-75% — Endurance

🟢 Z3 75-90% — Tempo

🟡 Z4 90-105% — Threshold

🟠 Z5 105-120% — VO2max

🔴 Z6 > 120% — Anaerobic

panels.title: Per-km Splits

targets.rawSql: WITH deltas AS (SELECT time_offset, hr, power, speed_kmh, altitude_m, cadence, COALESCE(speed_kmh, 0) / 3600.0 * (time_offset - LAG(time_offset, 1, time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS dist_delta, altitude_m - LAG(altitude_m) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset) AS alt_delta FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id}), cumulative AS (SELECT time_offset, hr, power, speed_kmh, altitude_m, cadence, alt_delta, SUM(dist_delta) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS dist_km FROM deltas), splits AS (SELECT FLOOR(dist_km)::int + 1 AS km, COUNT(*) AS seconds, ROUND(AVG(speed_kmh)::numeric, 1) AS avg_speed, ROUND(AVG(hr)::numeric, 0) AS avg_hr, ROUND(AVG(NULLIF(power, 0))::numeric, 0) AS avg_power, ROUND(AVG(NULLIF(cadence, 0))::numeric, 0) AS avg_cadence, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN alt_delta > 0 THEN alt_delta ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric, 0) AS elev_gain FROM cumulative WHERE dist_km >= 0 GROUP BY FLOOR(dist_km)::int) SELECT km AS "KM", CASE WHEN seconds = MIN(seconds) OVER () THEN '🟢 ' WHEN seconds = MAX(seconds) OVER () THEN '🔴 ' ELSE '' END || TO_CHAR(seconds * interval '1 second', 'MI:SS') AS "Pace", CASE WHEN avg_speed = MAX(avg_speed) OVER () THEN '🟢 ' WHEN avg_speed = MIN(avg_speed) OVER () THEN '🔴 ' ELSE '' END || avg_speed::text AS "Avg Speed", CASE WHEN avg_hr IS NULL THEN '—' WHEN avg_hr = MIN(avg_hr) OVER () THEN '🟢 ' || avg_hr::text WHEN avg_hr = MAX(avg_hr) OVER () THEN '🔴 ' || avg_hr::text ELSE avg_hr::text END AS "Avg HR", CASE WHEN avg_power IS NULL THEN '—' WHEN avg_power = MAX(avg_power) OVER () THEN '🟢 ' || avg_power::text WHEN avg_power = MIN(avg_power) OVER () THEN '🔴 ' || avg_power::text ELSE avg_power::text END AS "Avg Power", CASE WHEN avg_cadence IS NULL THEN '—' WHEN avg_cadence = MAX(avg_cadence) OVER () THEN '🟢 ' || avg_cadence::text WHEN avg_cadence = MIN(avg_cadence) OVER () THEN '🔴 ' || avg_cadence::text ELSE avg_cadence::text END AS "Cadence", elev_gain AS "Elev Gain (m)" FROM splits WHERE km < (SELECT MAX(km) FROM splits) ORDER BY km;

panels.description:
Performance breakdown per completed kilometer.

🟢 = best value in that column

🔴 = worst value in that column

Last incomplete km excluded.

targets.rawSql:
WITH deltas AS (
  SELECT
    time_offset, speed_kmh,
    altitude_m,
    COALESCE(speed_kmh, 0) / 3600.0 *
      (time_offset - LAG(time_offset, 1, time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS dist_delta
  FROM activity_streams
  WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id}
)
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(dist_delta) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)::numeric, 2) AS "Distance (km)",
  speed_kmh AS "Speed (km/h)",
  altitude_m AS "Elevation (m)"
FROM deltas
ORDER BY 1;

WITH deltas AS (
  SELECT
    time_offset, hr,
    power,
    COALESCE(speed_kmh, 0) / 3600.0 *
      (time_offset - LAG(time_offset, 1, time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS dist_delta
  FROM activity_streams
  WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id}
)
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(dist_delta) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)::numeric, 2) AS "Distance (km)",
  hr AS "HR (bpm)",
  power AS "Power (W)"
FROM deltas
ORDER BY 1;

WITH deltas AS (
  SELECT
    time_offset, cadence,
    altitude_m,
    COALESCE(speed_kmh, 0) / 3600.0 *
      (time_offset - LAG(time_offset, 1, time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS dist_delta,
    altitude_m - LAG(altitude_m) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset) AS alt_diff,
    COALESCE(speed_kmh, 0) / 3600.0 *
      (time_offset - LAG(time_offset, 1, time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS seg_dist
  FROM activity_streams
  WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id}
)
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(dist_delta) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)::numeric, 2) AS "Distance (km)",
  cadence AS "Cadence (rpm)",
  CASE WHEN seg_dist > 0.01 THEN ROUND((alt_diff / (seg_dist * 1000) * 100)::numeric, 1) ELSE 0 END AS "Grade (%)"
FROM deltas
ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Normalized Power

targets.rawSql: WITH rolling AS (SELECT time_offset, AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_30s FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) SELECT ROUND(POWER(AVG(POWER(rolling_30s, 4)), 0.25)::numeric, 0) AS "NP (W)" FROM rolling WHERE rolling_30s IS NOT NULL;

panels.description:
Normalized Power (NP)

What the ride "felt like" in watts



30s rolling average raised to 4th power,

then root-averaged. Accounts for surges —

hard efforts cost disproportionately more.



NP > Avg Power = variable effort

NP ≈ Avg Power = steady effort

panels.title: Intensity Factor
panels.description:
Intensity Factor (IF)

NP ÷ FTP — how hard was this ride?



🔘 < 0.6 — Recovery

🔵 0.6-0.7 — Easy endurance

🟢 0.7-0.85 — Tempo / group ride

🟡 0.85-0.95 — Threshold work

🟠 0.95-1.05 — Race effort

🔴 > 1.05 — Short max effort

panels.title: Variability Index

targets.rawSql: WITH rolling AS (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_30s FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0), np AS (SELECT POWER(AVG(POWER(rolling_30s, 4)), 0.25) AS np_val FROM rolling WHERE rolling_30s IS NOT NULL) SELECT ROUND((np.np_val / a.avg_power)::numeric, 2) AS "VI" FROM np, activities a WHERE a.id = ${activity_id} AND a.avg_power > 0;

panels.description:
Variability Index (VI)

NP ÷ Avg Power — how steady was your pacing?



🟢 1.00-1.05 — Very smooth (TT, ERG mode)

🟡 1.05-1.15 — Normal (group ride, rolling terrain)

🔴 > 1.15 — Very spiky (crits, stop-start)



Lower VI at same NP = more efficient pacing

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((distance_m / 1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Distance" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT ROUND(elevation_m::numeric, 0) AS "Elevation" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT duration_s AS "Duration" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT calories AS "Calories" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT ROUND(avg_speed_kmh::numeric, 1) AS "Speed" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT ROUND((SELECT MAX(speed_kmh) FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND speed_kmh IS NOT NULL)::numeric, 1) AS "Max Speed";
SELECT ROUND(tss::numeric, 0) AS "TSS" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT avg_power AS "Power" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT max_power AS "Max Power" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT avg_hr AS "HR" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT max_hr AS "Max HR" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT avg_cadence AS "Cadence" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};

panels.title: Power Duration Curve

targets.rawSql:
SELECT d.label AS "Duration", d.best_power AS "Best Avg Power (W)" FROM (
SELECT 1 AS ord, '5s' AS label, ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) AS best_power FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 2, '10s', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 3, '30s', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 4, '1min', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 5, '2min', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 119 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 6, '5min', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 299 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 7, '10min', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 599 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 8, '20min', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 1199 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 9, '60min', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 3599 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
) d WHERE d.best_power IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d.ord;

panels.description:
Best sustained average power at each duration.

Shows the highest average power you held

for each time window during this ride.

Steep drop = sprinter profile.

Flat curve = endurance profile.

panels.title: Efficiency Factor

targets.rawSql: WITH rolling AS (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_30s FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0), np AS (SELECT POWER(AVG(POWER(rolling_30s, 4)), 0.25) AS np_val FROM rolling WHERE rolling_30s IS NOT NULL) SELECT ROUND((np.np_val / a.avg_hr)::numeric, 2) AS "EF" FROM np, activities a WHERE a.id = ${activity_id} AND a.avg_hr > 0;

panels.description:
Efficiency Factor (EF)

NP ÷ Avg HR — aerobic efficiency



Higher = fitter (more watts per heartbeat)



Track over months:

📈 EF rising at same NP = fitness improving

📉 EF dropping = fatigue, heat, or detraining



Compare similar ride types and conditions

panels.title: Work

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((avg_power * duration_s / 1000.0)::numeric, 0) AS "Work (kJ)" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id} AND avg_power > 0;

panels.description:
Work (kJ)

Total mechanical energy output



Avg Power × Duration ÷ 1000



Roughly equals calories burned:

1 kJ ≈ 1 kcal (at ~25% human efficiency)



Useful for fueling: match kJ with food intake

panels.title: TRIMP

targets.rawSql: WITH lthr AS (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT value::numeric FROM sync_state WHERE key = 'configured_max_hr' AND value::numeric > 0), (SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY max_hr) FROM activities WHERE max_hr IS NOT NULL AND max_hr > 0)) AS thr) SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN s.hr < lthr.thr * 0.68 THEN 1 WHEN s.hr < lthr.thr * 0.83 THEN 2 WHEN s.hr < lthr.thr * 0.94 THEN 3 WHEN s.hr < lthr.thr * 1.05 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END) / 60.0::numeric, 0) AS "TRIMP" FROM activity_streams s, lthr WHERE s.activity_id = ${activity_id} AND s.hr IS NOT NULL AND s.hr > 0;

panels.description:
TRIMP (Training Impulse)

HR zone-weighted effort score



🔘 < 50 — Easy ride

🔵 50-75 — Light effort

🟢 75-100 — Moderate

🟡 100-125 — Hard

🟠 125-150 — Very hard

🔴 150+ — Race effort

targets.rawSql: WITH lthr AS (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT value::numeric FROM sync_state WHERE key = 'configured_max_hr' AND value::numeric > 0), (SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY max_hr) FROM activities WHERE max_hr IS NOT NULL AND max_hr > 0)) AS thr), buckets AS (SELECT FLOOR(hr / 5) * 5 AS bucket, COUNT(*) / 60.0 AS mins, CASE WHEN hr < lthr.thr * 0.68 THEN 'Z1 Recovery' WHEN hr < lthr.thr * 0.83 THEN 'Z2 Endurance' WHEN hr < lthr.thr * 0.94 THEN 'Z3 Tempo' WHEN hr < lthr.thr * 1.05 THEN 'Z4 Threshold' ELSE 'Z5 VO2max' END AS zone FROM activity_streams, lthr WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND hr IS NOT NULL AND hr > 0 GROUP BY bucket, zone) SELECT bucket::int AS "HR (bpm)", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z1 Recovery'), 0) AS "Z1 Recovery", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z2 Endurance'), 0) AS "Z2 Endurance", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z3 Tempo'), 0) AS "Z3 Tempo", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z4 Threshold'), 0) AS "Z4 Threshold", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z5 VO2max'), 0) AS "Z5 VO2max" FROM buckets GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket;
